data_freshness.source: portfolio_snapshots row (LTPs marked at 10:46:54); no 11:00 live mark was available, so figures below are based on the 10:46 snapshot.

still_open.note: unchanged from 09:00 and 10:30 ticks — has not filled in 1st trading hour today

trigger_a_adanipower_fills.status: ADANIPOWER still OPEN, unchanged since 2026-04-22 submission; deployed held at 73.55%

trigger_b_unrealized_below_neg_1_pct.note: unrealized worsened -139 bps from 10:14 trough-recovery but only reached -0.35%, still ~3x buffer to the -1% trigger and ~8.7x buffer to the 3% daily-loss gate

trigger_c_strategy_first_sell_or_exit.status: no SELL, no MODIFY, no new BUY since market open; 0 strategy-layer decisions in 2 hours of trading on Day 2

trigger_d_bfsi_climbs_further.note: BFSI share essentially flat tick-over-tick (+1 bp); no new BFSI entry admitted — expected, since max_deployed_pct=0.72 is blocking all new entries

trigger_e_deployed_below_0_68_via_exits.note: no exits have occurred; deployed tracking mark-to-market only

findings: Portfolio state is materially unchanged since the 10:30 tick: zero new fills, zero new submissions, zero SELL/MODIFY decisions from the strategy layer in the 30 minutes since — still nine holdings, still one OPEN ADANIPOWER order carried from 2026-04-22.

Unrealized P&L reversed mildly from its 10:14 recovery high: -₹2,070 (10:14) → -₹3,462 (10:46), a -139 bps deterioration in 32 minutes. Drivers: MAHABANK (BFSI-PSU, -612), HINDUNILVR (FMCG flipped positive→negative, -626), NESTLEIND (FMCG, -366). AUBANK gave back its earlier loss (+246) and TORNTPOWER extended gains (+158). Net move is small (-₹1,392) and remains ~8.7x inside the daily-loss gate.

AUBANK single-name exposure 18.53% of capital (176 × ₹1049.05) — passively BREACHES max_position_pct=0.15 by 3.53 pp. Unchanged from 10:30 breach (was 18.48%). Position-cap overrides cannot retroactively trim; exit requires a strategy-layer SELL.

BFSI cluster 35.92% of capital / 48.84% of deployed (MAHABANK 9.45% + PNBHOUSING 7.95% + AUBANK 18.53%) — still BREACHES the 25%-of-capital cluster-alert threshold by 10.92 pp. Flat tick-over-tick; not inflecting. No sector-cap parameter exists in base config, so this remains controllable only indirectly via max_deployed_pct back-pressure.

Deployed 73.55% of total value is ABOVE the 10:30 max_deployed_pct=0.72 cap by 1.55 pp — this is the intended grandfathered state from the 10:30 tightening (cap set below current deployment specifically to force SELL-before-BUY dynamics). The cap is therefore working as designed: it is blocking new admissions, and the strategy layer's 0 decisions in the last 30 min is consistent with the back-pressure landing (no entry is admissible without a prior trim).

None of the five reassessment triggers specified at 10:30 have fired: ADANIPOWER still OPEN; unrealized at -0.35% (trigger threshold -1.0%); no SELL/EXIT executed; BFSI cluster flat; no exits to inflect deployed downward. The 10:30 override posture is therefore binding and adequate for the observed state.

Housekeeping observation: the 10:30 risk_assessment JSON claims 'override file updated, changelog entry added' but the risk_config.yaml changelog ends at 2026-04-22 16:00:00 — the override VALUE was updated (max_deployed_pct=0.72 is present in the overrides block) but the changelog paperwork was not written. This is not re-tightenable from my tick and I am deliberately not backfilling an entry purporting to be from a prior agent. Flagging for awareness.
No intraday positions (paper_positions empty); all exposure remains in CNC holdings, so intraday-leverage risk remains a non-issue.
actions_taken: No numeric override changes this tick. Holding min_confidence=0.60, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.72 (the 10:30 posture) into the 11:30 tick.

Rationale: the 10:30 tick added max_deployed_pct=0.72 as the primary new-entry back-pressure lever, sized below current deployment (0.7355) specifically to require a SELL before any BUY. The observed state since — zero strategy decisions, no fills, unrealized mildly worsening but comfortably inside the loss gate, BFSI cluster flat — is exactly the state that lever was designed to produce. Adding a further numeric lever here (e.g., max_deployed_pct 0.72 → 0.70) would be additive friction without a firing trigger: it would not retract any grandfathered breach (AUBANK, BFSI cluster, ADANIPOWER pending), and it would not influence strategy-layer SELL behavior — which is where the actionable next move sits per yesterday's prompt-layer ORDER HYGIENE / CLUSTER DISCIPLINE additions. The right pattern remains: let the strategy layer observe and act, add levers only on observed trigger events.
actions_not_taken: Did NOT further tighten max_deployed_pct (0.72 → 0.70). Reason: trigger (a) has not fired — ADANIPOWER has not filled, so projected deployment has not jumped to 78.49%. Tightening preemptively would be additive friction without a trigger event and the 10:30 cap is already below current deployment (binding).

Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03 → 0.025). Reason: trigger (b) has not fired — unrealized P&L at -0.35% is still ~3x inside the -1% reassessment threshold and ~8.7x inside the 3% loss gate. Realized P&L is ₹0 (no sells). The 10:14→10:46 reversal is within normal intraday noise on a BFSI/FMCG-heavy book.

Did NOT tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12 or lower). Reason: same as 10:30 — the AUBANK passive breach (18.53%) is mark-to-market on grandfathered fills, and lowering the cap cannot retract it. Strictly punitive to smaller names.

Did NOT raise min_confidence (0.60 → 0.65). Reason: still no realized-outcome signal to justify raising the floor. The 0.72-confidence Day-1 entries (MAHABANK, NESTLEIND) remain the larger mark-to-market laggards, which argues AGAINST confidence as a predictive filter on this sample. Revisit once realized SELLs accumulate.

Did NOT tighten default_sl_pct / drawdown_reduce_pct / drawdown_halt_pct. Reason: no SL triggers fired; unrealized drawdown at -0.35% is far from drawdown_reduce_pct=0.10 and drawdown_halt_pct=0.15. Tightening SL/drawdown without any realized-loss data on a flat-P&L book is premature.

Did NOT backfill the missing 10:30 changelog entry in risk_config.yaml. Reason: impersonating a prior agent in the changelog would corrupt the audit trail. Flagged as a housekeeping observation in findings; the next agent that touches the file should decide whether to add a corrective note under its own timestamp/identity.
reassessment_triggers_next_tick: (a) ADANIPOWER OPEN fills (projected deployed 78.49%, Power cluster 16.08%) and strategy has NOT trimmed anything → tighten max_deployed_pct 0.72 → 0.70 to compound back-pressure on further additions.
(b) Unrealized P&L breaks below -1.0% of capital (-₹9,966) → tighten daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025 as a leading defense. Current buffer: ₹6,538 from the trigger, ~₹26,500 from the loss gate.

(c) Strategy layer executes its FIRST SELL/EXIT → read the decision justification. If AUBANK trim, relax max_deployed_pct 0.72 → 0.74 (one-way, above the 10:30 setting) to reopen admission for diversifying entries. Never above 0.75 (pre-breach baseline).

(d) BFSI cluster % of capital climbs above 0.37 (+1 pp from here) via mark moves OR a new BFSI entry admitted despite the 0.72 cap → tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65 to gate-keep decision quality, since sizing and deployment levers have both been partially defeated.

(e) MAHABANK single-name unrealized P&L breaks below -5% (-₹4,890) → evaluate whether to signal urgency to the strategy layer via a tighter default_sl_pct (0.02 → 0.015), since MAHABANK has been the persistent top loser across all four snapshots today (-2.15%, -2.98%, -3.10%, -3.73%) — a deteriorating trend, not noise.

(f) If 11:30 tick still shows ZERO strategy-layer decisions (SELL / MODIFY / new BUY) for a cumulative 2.5 hours post-open → flag as a strategy-layer stall, and do NOT add further risk_config levers (more numeric friction will not fix a behavioral gap). Route attention to prompt-layer review instead.
